# VCF to MAF Custom Track

**Version**: 1.0.1
**Category**: Graph/Display Data

## Example Query

## Run via Galaxy Bridge

```bash
python galaxy_bridge.py --tool-details vcf_to_maf_customtrack1
python galaxy_bridge.py --run vcf_to_maf_customtrack1 --input <file> --output <dir>
```
